creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: lippe
Date: Fri Mar 29 00:52:44 2013
New Revision: 315510
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/315510

Log:
  - Update to 0.7.9.
  
  PR:		ports/176770
  Submitted by:	William Grzybowski <william88@gmail.com>
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout ( >2 weeks)

Deleted:
  head/devel/py-mongoengine/pkg-plist
Modified:
  head/devel/py-mongoengine/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/py-mongoengine/distinfo   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/devel/py-mongoengine/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-mongoengine/Makefile	Fri Mar 29 00:44:53 2013	(r315509)
+++ head/devel/py-mongoengine/Makefile	Fri Mar 29 00:52:44 2013	(r315510)
@@ -1,12 +1,8 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	py-mongoengine
-# Date created:		2010-06-04
-# Whom:			Mirko Zinn <mail@derzinn.de>
-#
+# Created by: Mirko Zinn <mail@derzinn.de>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	mongoengine
-PORTVERSION=	0.6.8
+PORTVERSION=	0.7.9
 CATEGORIES=	devel python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -21,5 +17,6 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	pymongo>=2.1:${PORTSDIR}/da
 USE_PYTHON=		yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
 PYDISTUTILS_NOEGGINFO=	yes
+PLIST_FILES=		%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/devel/py-mongoengine/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-mongoengine/distinfo	Fri Mar 29 00:44:53 2013	(r315509)
+++ head/devel/py-mongoengine/distinfo	Fri Mar 29 00:52:44 2013	(r315510)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (mongoengine-0.6.8.tar.gz) = a896cad0b4b25cb749cff993f2f881a2e294d5d5a4687f18157f812e4d485b24
-SIZE (mongoengine-0.6.8.tar.gz) = 158125
+SHA256 (mongoengine-0.7.9.tar.gz) = 729e6dd366b049a0dcd1694a36f1a8166d4643dd2074ff6c9c085aa349164673
+SIZE (mongoengine-0.7.9.tar.gz) = 103159
